description: Style NoteThis simple T-shirt from adidas can be styled easily and is extremely comfortable. Wear this tee casually with jeans or with shorts when working out to enjoy the performance enhancing fabric. Product DetailsBlack T-shirt, has a round neckline, short sleeves with Adidas patented three stripes on the shoulders and sleeves and branding left chestMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach or tumble dryUse warm ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
